SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT

THIS SHAREHOLDERS AGREEMENT (the "SHA") is made on this 15th day of February 2024.

BETWEEN:

1. Mr. Tan Wei Ming (NRIC: S2345678Z), residing at 123 Orchard Road, #12-34, Singapore 567890, email: tanweiming@example.sg, phone: +65 9123 4567.

2. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah (NRIC: S3456789A), residing at 456 Bukit Timah Road, #21-45, Singapore 678901, email: sitiaishah@example.sg, phone: +65 9876 5432.

3. Dr. Ramasamy Muthu (UEN: T12LL3456X), residing at 789 Serangoon Avenue, #32-56, Singapore 789012, email: ramasamy.muthu@example.sg, phone: +65 9234 5678.

WHEREAS the parties have agreed to enter into this SHA to regulate their relationship as shareholders of XYZ Pte. Ltd. (UEN: 200912345C).

IT IS AGREED that the total investment committed under this SHA is SGD $500,000 (the "Investment Amount"). The SHA shall govern matters related to the management and operation of XYZ Pte. Ltd.

For clarity, this SHA does not include any details regarding the project plan or project status updates.

Furthermore, each party acknowledges the URL with embedded personal identifier: https://example.sg/user/S3456789A for secure document access.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the undersigned have executed this SHA as of the date first above written.
